agent_context.description: Optional additional system prompt for the voice agent — extra background, tone, or constraints.

id.description: A UUID string identifying this user interview topic.

interviewee_distinct_ids.description: PostHog distinct IDs of people to interview. May be combined with interviewee_emails.

interviewee_emails.description: Email addresses of people to interview. May be combined with interviewee_distinct_ids.

questions.description: Ordered list of questions the voice agent should work through during the interview.

topic.description: The product, feature, or idea you want to ask interviewees about.
